result.summary: Mapped Lucid’s public developer surface: 2 HTTP APIs (REST API and SCIM API) plus the public npm-distributed `lucid-package` CLI; auth uses Lucid-issued OAuth 2.0 clients, API keys, and SCIM bearer tokens.

lucid_oauth_client.label: Lucid OAuth 2.0 client (client ID + client secret)
lucid_oauth_client.setup: In the [Lucid Developer Portal docs](https://developer.lucid.co/docs/oauth-20-client-creation), create an OAuth 2.0 client for your app and configure its redirect URI(s). Lucid's public docs state the authorization endpoint is `https://lucid.app/oauth2/authorizeUser` and the token endpoint is `https://api.lucid.co/oauth2/token`. Request only the scopes your integration needs, such as `user.profile`, document scopes, or `offline_access` for refresh tokens.

lucid_api_key.label: Lucid API key
lucid_api_key.setup: Create an API key from the Lucid developer/admin experience described in [API Keys](https://developer.lucid.co/docs/api-keys) and [Creating a key](https://developer.lucid.co/reference/creating-a-key). Grant it only the minimum permissions needed, as described in [API Key Grants](https://developer.lucid.co/reference/api-key-grants).

lucid_scim_token.label: Lucid SCIM bearer token
lucid_scim_token.setup: For SCIM on Enterprise accounts, an admin manages access to the account's SCIM bearer token from Lucid's admin/developer controls, as described in [Admin controls](https://developer.lucid.co/docs/admin-controls). Use that token to provision users and groups against the SCIM API.

surfaces.name: Lucid REST API

requiredHeaders.name: Lucid-Api-Version
requiredHeaders.description: Docs example requests include Lucid API version header `1`.

surfaces.notes: The reference states Lucid APIs serve multiple products via parameters including `lucidchart`, `lucidscale`, and `lucidspark`. OAuth scopes published by Lucid include document, invitation, profile, and offline access scopes.

surfaces.name: Lucid SCIM API
surfaces.notes: Enterprise SCIM surface for user provisioning, de-provisioning, and group/team management.
